overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, passing neon-lit storefronts and a group of three people sitting on a ledge. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with cinematic quality and vibrant neon lighting reflecting off wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with palm trees and neon signage

events.description: three people sitting on a concrete ledge come into view ahead on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk under the covered walkway, approaching the sitting group

tall palm tree trunk visible beside the walkway with textured bark
continuous yellow barrier with reflective strips separating sidewalk from the street
large illuminated advertisement displaying a burger with pink neon text
three individuals seated on a raised concrete ledge ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk street at night, walking under a covered walkway illuminated by cyan neon strips. The camera approaches three people sitting on a concrete ledge ahead, with palm trees and a yellow road barrier visible. Large digital billboards glow in the distance.

rain becomes more visible as the camera moves past the sheltered area

agents.ego_description: walking past the three people sitting on the concrete ledge, briefly observing them

notable_agents.action: three individuals sitting on a concrete ledge, one wearing a yellow plaid shirt and another in red pants, as the camera passes by

entered.detail: green painted metal railing running along the top of the concrete ledge
dark concrete wall with integrated cyan lighting strips at the base
short black bollards with yellow stripes and white illuminated tops

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past three individuals sitting on a concrete ledge with green railings. The concrete wall on the left features integrated lighting, while illuminated bollards line the right side of the path. Rain is visible falling as the camera leaves the main covered area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian street with commercial storefronts and digital billboards

events.description: passing a security guard standing near the illuminated road bollards
approaching the escalator structure and large Watson Whore billboard

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past various storefronts, signage, and a security guard

notable_agents.action: security guard in dark uniform standing near the bollards looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: uniformed security figure standing on the sidewalk near the road
large vertical billboard with pink neon text reading WATSON WHORE and imagery
illuminated corporate sign for KENDACHI with red and white lettering
metal escalator with glass sides leading to an upper pedestrian level
illuminated vending kiosks with glowing advertisements on the sides

segments.scene_description: The camera continues down the wet sidewalk past a security guard standing near illuminated bollards. The scene opens up to reveal large digital billboards including one for WATSON WHORE and the KENDACHI corporation. An escalator structure and glowing vending machines appear on the left as the camera approaches a more commercial intersection area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered neon walkway into a wide, rain-drenched commercial intersection. It begins under a covered path illuminated by cyan neon strips, moving toward three people perched on a concrete ledge beside palm trees and yellow road barriers. As the camera passes the group and their green railings, it leaves the shelter of the walkway, exposing the scene to the falling rain and the glow of integrated wall lighting and bollards. The path then opens up past a standing security guard to reveal a vibrant cityscape dominated by massive digital billboards for Watson Whore and the Kendachi corporation. Finally, the view expands toward a commercial hub featuring glowing vending machines and an escalator structure under the shimmering night sky.
